title: Make mutations atomic and durable
description: Each successful Ledger mutation is durable as one logical change; validation, storage, crash, integrity, and resource failures fail closed without partial canonical, evidence, reconciliation, attribution, financial, or recovery state.
target: For every injected failure point, restart inspection observes either the complete committed mutation exactly once or the unchanged pre-operation state, with zero partial transactions, evidence links, Reconciliation Decision, assignments, relationships, scopes, or artifacts.
load_condition: All public writes, including evidence registration and linking, reconciliation application and correction, payment and pool attribution, transaction and relationship correction, restore activation, and storage evolution.
measurement: Automated fault-injection and restart tests at each persistence boundary, followed by integrity, uniqueness, cardinality, history, idempotency, and exact pool/category total checks.
rationale: Partial writes can create duplicate actuals or unsupported reconciliation meaning and can silently corrupt recovery. Supports G2, G4, G7-G12.
